day2_lunch_choice.name: Me
choices: Go to the library to see Yuna

day2_lunch_sea_1.name: Me
day2_lunch_sea_1.text: *Today's lunch box. Even more elaborate than yesterday. Chicken cutlet, flower-shaped carrots, mini kimbap.*

day2_lunch_sea_2.name: Me
day2_lunch_sea_2.text: "...How early did you get up to make all this?"

day2_lunch_sea_3.name: Han Sea
day2_lunch_sea_3.text: "It makes me happy when you eat well."

day2_lunch_sea_5.name: Han Sea
day2_lunch_sea_5.text: "My mom taught me. We cooked together since elementary school."

day2_lunch_sea_8.name: Me
day2_lunch_sea_8.text: *Sea trails off, picking up a piece of kimbap with her chopsticks.*

day2_lunch_sea_9.name: Han Sea
day2_lunch_sea_9.text: "Mom's busy. Dad too. So making lunch boxes in the morning is kind of... a routine for me. It feels empty if I don't."

day2_lunch_sea_11.name: Han Sea
day2_lunch_sea_11.text: "It's fine~ You eat everything without leaving any, so that makes me happy too."

day2_lunch_sea_12.name: Me
day2_lunch_sea_12.text: *Sea moves a mini kimbap into my lunch box. We eat for a while, talking about music, games, and movies.*

day2_lunch_sea_13.name: Han Sea
day2_lunch_sea_13.text: "{name}, what are you doing this weekend?"

day2_lunch_sea_14.name: Me
day2_lunch_sea_14.text: "Nothing really... I don't even know the area yet."

day2_lunch_sea_15.name: Han Sea
day2_lunch_sea_15.text: "Then do you want to go downtown on Saturday? Let's go to a cafe. There's a great croffle place."

day2_lunch_sea_20.name: Me
day2_lunch_sea_20.text: *Sea ducks her head, pretending to focus on her lunch box. She hands me one earbud. A gentle song flows through.*

day2_lunch_sea_21.name: Han Sea
day2_lunch_sea_21.text: "This is the band I mentioned earlier. This song is my favorite."

day2_lunch_sea_22.name: Me
day2_lunch_sea_22.text: *The lyrics play. 'Even knowing I'll be forgotten, I call your name into the night' — Sea mouths along to the words.*

day2_lunch_sea_25.name: Me
day2_lunch_sea_25.text: *Sea smiles contentedly. She looks somehow relieved.*

day2_lunch_yuna_1.name: Me
day2_lunch_yuna_1.text: *Yuna is fiddling with her camera. A corner seat in the library. A bag of snacks sits beside her.*

day2_lunch_yuna_2.name: Yuna
day2_lunch_yuna_2.text: "Senpai! You came? Look at what I took today."

day2_lunch_yuna_3.name: Me
day2_lunch_yuna_3.text: *I flip through the photos. The hill behind school, the gym, a cat...*

day2_lunch_yuna_4.name: Me
day2_lunch_yuna_4.text: "You're really good at photography. Where's this cat?"

day2_lunch_yuna_5.name: Yuna
day2_lunch_yuna_5.text: "Behind the gym. It's always in the same spot. I named it 'Acorn.'"

day2_lunch_yuna_7.name: Yuna
day2_lunch_yuna_7.text: "Because it has a round face like an acorn. See, look here."

day2_lunch_yuna_8.name: Me
day2_lunch_yuna_8.text: *Yuna zooms in on the screen. Its face is definitely round.*

day2_lunch_yuna_10.name: Me
day2_lunch_yuna_10.text: "No, just phone camera stuff? I don't really take photos."

day2_lunch_yuna_11.name: Yuna
day2_lunch_yuna_11.text: "But you have a good eye. Yesterday you said the composition of the gym photo was good."

day2_lunch_yuna_14.name: Me
day2_lunch_yuna_14.text: *Yuna smiles slightly. She seems sincere. As we keep flipping through photos, Yuna suddenly asks.*

day2_lunch_yuna_15.name: Yuna
day2_lunch_yuna_15.text: "Senpai... have you been to this school before?"

day2_lunch_yuna_18.name: Me
day2_lunch_yuna_18.text: *Yuna smiles, but her eyes aren't smiling. It felt like she was trying to confirm something.*

day2_lunch_yuna_19.name: Yuna
day2_lunch_yuna_19.text: "Oh, it's nothing. I just asked because you seemed familiar somehow..."

day2_lunch_yuna_20.name: Me
day2_lunch_yuna_20.text: *...Familiar? We're meeting for the first time. Maybe she's confusing me with someone else since she's in the photography club.*

day2_lunch_yuna_21.name: Yuna
day2_lunch_yuna_21.text: "If you're interested in the photography club, join us. We're a bit short on members..."

day2_lunch_yuna_23.name: Yuna
day2_lunch_yuna_23.text: "Okay! No pressure. I just thought... it'd be fun to take photos together, senpai."

day2_lunch_yuna_24.name: Me
day2_lunch_yuna_24.text: *Yuna says this, hugging the camera to her chest. She has this careful way of speaking. Like she's trying not to hurt the other person.*

day2_lunch_riin_1.name: Riin
day2_lunch_riin_1.text: "There's no health record for you as a transfer student yet. Let me do a quick check."

day2_lunch_riin_2.name: Me
day2_lunch_riin_2.text: *Blood pressure, eyesight, weight. A basic checkup.*

day2_lunch_riin_3.name: Riin
day2_lunch_riin_3.text: "Do you have any allergies? Food or medication."

day2_lunch_riin_6.name: Me
day2_lunch_riin_6.text: *Nurse Riin writes something in the record book. She's writing quite a lot. For a basic checkup.*

day2_lunch_riin_8.name: Me
day2_lunch_riin_8.text: *Nurse Riin stops writing and looks at me. Something seems to be bothering her.*

day2_lunch_riin_9.name: Riin
day2_lunch_riin_9.text: "Have you been dreaming a lot lately?"

day2_lunch_riin_11.name: Riin
day2_lunch_riin_11.text: "Transfer stress can lower sleep quality. If you're dreaming a lot, it means you're not getting deep sleep."

day2_lunch_riin_12.name: Me
day2_lunch_riin_12.text: "I had a strange dream yesterday. I don't remember it well, though."

day2_lunch_riin_13.name: Me
day2_lunch_riin_13.text: *Nurse Riin pauses for a moment, then continues writing.*

day2_lunch_riin_14.name: Riin
day2_lunch_riin_14.text: "If you remember the details, tell me. It can be a stress indicator."

day2_lunch_riin_16.name: Me
day2_lunch_riin_16.text: *The checkup is over and I'm about to leave when Nurse Riin takes out tea from a cabinet.*

day2_lunch_riin_17.name: Riin
day2_lunch_riin_17.text: "If you're not in a hurry, have a cup of tea before you go. Chamomile."

day2_lunch_riin_18.name: Me
day2_lunch_riin_18.text: *I sit on the nurse's office sofa. A quiet space with sunlight streaming in. Nurse Riin sits across from me.*

day2_lunch_riin_20.name: Me
day2_lunch_riin_20.text: "Better than I expected. Everyone's been nice."

day2_lunch_riin_24.name: Me
day2_lunch_riin_24.text: *Nurse Riin wraps both hands around her teacup and gazes out the window.*

day2_lunch_riin_25.name: Riin
day2_lunch_riin_25.text: "...But sometimes when people are too kind, it makes you anxious. Like, 'Do I deserve this?'"

day2_lunch_riin_26.name: Me
day2_lunch_riin_26.text: "...Have you felt that way too, teacher?"

day2_lunch_riin_27.name: Me
day2_lunch_riin_27.text: *Nurse Riin turns to look at me. She seems about to say something, but then —*

day2_lunch_riin_28.name: Riin
day2_lunch_riin_28.text: "Finish your tea and head to class. You'll be late for the afternoon."

day2_lunch_riin_29.name: Me
day2_lunch_riin_29.text: *She dodged the question. ...Maybe I asked something too personal. It almost got awkward, but Nurse Riin smoothed it over with a smile.*

day2_lunch_rooftop_1.name: Me
day2_lunch_rooftop_1.text: *I'm climbing the stairs to the rooftop when I hear a voice from the landing.*

day2_lunch_rooftop_2.name: Eunsu
day2_lunch_rooftop_2.text: "...Yes, I've submitted the approval. I'll wrap this one up without issues, like last year. ...I'll finish within five days."

day2_lunch_rooftop_3.name: Me
day2_lunch_rooftop_3.text: *I make a sound and the teacher hangs up.*

day2_lunch_rooftop_6.name: Eunsu
day2_lunch_rooftop_6.text: "It's the start of the semester, so there's a lot of paperwork. Board of education stuff. Nothing for {name} to worry about."

day2_lunch_rooftop_7.name: Me
day2_lunch_rooftop_7.text: *The teacher smiled and walked past. She looks busy. Being a homeroom teacher at the start of the semester must be like that.*

day2_lunch_rooftop_8.name: Me
day2_lunch_rooftop_8.text: *I'm on the rooftop. The wind blows. No lunch box, but I unwrap a convenience store rice ball.*

day2_lunch_rooftop_9.name: Me
day2_lunch_rooftop_9.text: *...It's wide open. Mountains visible beyond the school buildings. A strangely familiar landscape.*

day2_lunch_rooftop_10.name: Me
day2_lunch_rooftop_10.text: *The teacher's phone call from earlier is bothering me. It sounded like she was reporting on someone's condition. ...But if it's the board of education, maybe they use that kind of language. Don't overthink it.*

day2_lunch_rooftop_11.name: Me
day2_lunch_rooftop_11.text: *The wind ruffles my hair. If I close my eyes, I think I can hear another sound. Someone laughing. Here. On this rooftop. ...Am I hearing things? It must be the wind.*
